chart.prompt: Top 5 Lieferanten nach Bestellvolumen seit Jahresanfang, absteigend
chart.sql_string:
WITH purchase_volume AS (
    SELECT
        po.address_id AS supplier_address_id,
        po.name AS supplier_name,
        po.document_number,
        po.purchase_order_id,
        po.total_amount
    FROM purchase_orders po
    WHERE po.status NOT IN ('created', 'canceled', 'unknown')
      AND po.date >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE)
)
SELECT
    COALESCE(pv.supplier_name, CAST(pv.supplier_address_id AS VARCHAR)) AS "Lieferant",
    COUNT(DISTINCT pv.purchase_order_id) AS "Anzahl Bestellungen",
    ROUND(SUM(pv.total_amount), 2) AS "Bestellvolumen"
FROM purchase_volume pv
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY "Bestellvolumen" DESC
LIMIT 5;

en.title: Top 5 suppliers (YTD)
en.description: The five suppliers carrying the most order volume year-to-date — supply-dependency indicator.

de.title: Top-5 Lieferanten (YTD)
de.description: Die fünf Lieferanten mit dem größten Bestellvolumen seit Jahresbeginn — Lieferanten-Abhängigkeits-Indikator.
